next_steps: Provision Vercel KV / Upstash Redis for the musu.pro project.
Use scripts\windows\configure-musu-pro-p2p-env.ps1 to set KV_REST_API_URL/KV_REST_API_TOKEN or UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL/UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN without printing secret values.
Set KV_REST_API_URL and KV_REST_API_TOKEN, or the equivalent Upstash REST env names, in GitHub repo secrets/variables or Vercel production env.
Run gh workflow run deploy-musu-bee.yml --repo yellowhama/musu-bee --ref main, then rerun P2P control-plane evidence.
p2p_env.notes: Secret values are never printed; this status checks names and live evidence only.
